name: accounting firms managing 10-20 clients tool
description: For accounting firms managing 10-20 clients, manual reconciliation of bank transactions and credit card statements causes late financial reports. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation processes using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: manual reconciliation of bank transactions and credit card statements

locked_fields.primary_problem: manual reconciliation of bank transactions and credit card statements
